response.justification: Bogdan vastly exceeds the technical requirements for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of experience as a Senior/Staff engineer across TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and even LLM/agent infrastructure. He covers nearly every required and nice-to-have skill. However, this is an entry-level position, creating significant risk of mismatch on compensation, motivation, and retention. He is Berlin-based which satisfies the on-site requirement. Worth a screening call only to clarify why he is targeting a junior role and his salary expectations before investing further.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js plus React experience across multiple production platforms
Covers most nice-to-haves: AWS (CDK), Kubernetes, LLM/MCP agent tooling
Berlin-based, fits the high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying to an entry-level role
High retention/compensation risk; likely to outgrow the role quickly or expect senior pay
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; databases listed are MongoDB/MySQL/SQL
